description_long: This object consists of three stylized, polygonal flowers with broad, flat, purple petals and thick, angular green stems. The petals are arranged in a shallow, open cup shape, each flower head displaying a faceted, geometric surface. The stems are robust and taper slightly toward the base, with no visible leaves attached. The flowers are grouped closely together, forming a small cluster that would be suitable for decorative planting in urban parks, sidewalk planters, or landscaped medians. The overall appearance is low-poly and abstract, emphasizing bold color contrast between the purple petals and green stems. The flowers lack fine botanical details such as stamens or pistils, focusing instead on a simplified, modern aesthetic.
description: A cluster of three stylized purple flowers with faceted petals and thick green stems, arranged in a geometric, low-poly style.
description_view_0: Three purple flowers with angular petals and green stems, with the central flower most prominent and the others flanking it.
description_view_1: The cluster is seen more from the side, revealing the depth and overlap of the flower heads and the varying stem angles.
description_view_2: A rear view showing the underside of the largest flower and the arrangement of the stems, with one flower partially obscured.
description_view_3: A perspective highlighting the angularity of the petals and the close grouping of the three flowers, with stems visible at different angles.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial configuration, forming a shallow, open cup with overlapping edges and geometric symmetry.
